nasb.text: It will come about in that day,” declares the Lord, “That you will call Me Ishi And will no longer call Me Baali.

esv.text: “And in that day, declares the Lord, you will call me ‘My Husband,’ and no longer will you call me ‘My Baal.’

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“到那日， 你必稱呼我‘伊施’， 不再稱呼我‘巴力’。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “那时，你要称我为丈夫， 不再称我为主人。
